query:
INSERT INTO variant_pricing (
  variantId,
  factoryCostRmbIncTax,
  sellingPriceRmbIncTax,
  sellingPriceFobL1,
  effectiveDate,
  isCurrent,
  createdAt
)
SELECT 
  id as variantId,
  costPriceRMB as factoryCostRmbIncTax,
  sellingPriceRMB as sellingPriceRmbIncTax,
  sellingPriceFOB as sellingPriceFobL1,
  NOW() as effectiveDate,
  1 as isCurrent,
  NOW() as createdAt
FROM product_variants
WHERE (sellingPriceFOB IS NOT NULL OR sellingPriceRMB IS NOT NULL OR costPriceRMB IS NOT NULL)
  AND id NOT IN (SELECT variantId FROM variant_pricing);

INSERT INTO variant_pricing (
  variantId,
  factoryCostRmbIncTax,
  sellingPriceRmbIncTax,
  sellingPriceFobL1,
  effectiveDate,
  isCurrent,
  createdAt
)
SELECT 
  id as variantId,
  costPriceRMB as factoryCostRmbIncTax,
  sellingPriceRMB as sellingPriceRmbIncTax,
  sellingPriceFOB as sellingPriceFobL1,
  NOW() as effectiveDate,
  1 as isCurrent,
  NOW() as createdAt
FROM product_variants
WHERE (sellingPriceFOB IS NOT NULL OR sellingPriceRMB IS NOT NULL OR costPriceRMB IS NOT NULL)
  AND id NOT IN (SELECT variantId FROM variant_pricing);
